saveMessage.sql: INSERT INTO chat_messages (fid, msg_id, msg_type, content, sender_id, sender_name, sender_type, receiver_id, timestamp) VALUES (#{fid}, #{msgId}, #{msgType}, #{content}, #{senderId}, #{senderName}, #{senderType}, #{receiverId}, #{timestamp})
saveMessage.description: 保存聊天消息 - V47.0添加fid字段

getMessages.sql: SELECT msg_id as id, msg_id, msg_type, content, sender_id as senderId, sender_name as senderName, sender_type, receiver_id as receiverId, timestamp FROM chat_messages WHERE sender_type = #{senderType} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
getMessages.description: 获取消息列表，支持分页

getMessagesByTime.sql: SELECT msg_id as id, msg_id, msg_type, content, sender_id as senderId, sender_name as senderName, sender_type, receiver_id as receiverId, timestamp FROM chat_messages WHERE sender_type = #{senderType} AND deleted = 0 AND timestamp < #{beforeTimestamp} ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT #{limit}
getMessagesByTime.description: 根据时间戳获取历史消息（用于分页）

updateMessage.sql: UPDATE chat_messages SET content = #{content} WHERE msg_id = #{msgId}

deleteMessage.sql: UPDATE chat_messages SET deleted = 1 WHERE msg_id = #{msgId}

getOnlineUsers.sql: SELECT * FROM chat_messages WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY sender_id
